markets.rules_primary: If Max Verstappen set the fastest valid qualifying lap time in the qualifying session that determines the starting grid for the Japanese Grand Prix originally scheduled for March 28, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: For the purposes of this market, Pole Position is awarded to the driver who records the fastest official lap time in the Qualifying session (Q3) of the Grand Prix, as determined by the FIA’s published classification. If Qualifying does not progress to Q3 (e.g., weather, red flags, or format changes), Pole Position will be awarded based on the FIA’s official qualifying results for that event. Pole Position for this market is determined exclusively by the official qualifying classification and is not impacted by the final starting grid; any subsequent grid penalties or starting-order adjustments do not change who is deemed to have achieved Pole Position. Sprint Race qualifying sessions are not considered for this market.
